name: Kevin ZHAO Weiming
title: Chief AI Architect
affiliation: EC-ZERO Lab, Global Institute of Future Technology, Shanghai Jiao Tong University
bio: I am Chief AI Architect at EC-ZERO Lab, Global Institute of Future Technology, Shanghai Jiao Tong University. I work across AI4Science, intelligent laboratory systems, XR, computer vision, and human-centred computing.
heroLabel: CHIEF AI ARCHITECT @ EC-ZERO LAB, SJTU

paragraphs: I am the Chief AI Architect at EC-ZERO Lab, Global Institute of Future Technology, Shanghai Jiao Tong University. My work focuses on building AI-driven research toolchains and intelligent laboratory infrastructure for electrochemical research, smart laboratories, and engineering practice. I am particularly interested in how generative AI, computer vision, human-centred computing, and extended reality can support scientific discovery and next-generation research workflows.

Before joining EC-ZERO, I served as an educational engineer and Director of the Extended Reality Lab at the SJTU Student Innovation Center, where I led curriculum development and student innovation training in AI and XR. I also worked as a Research Associate at the Energy Research Institute @ NTU (ERI@N) in Singapore, specialising in 3D LiDAR visualisation and GUI design.
I hold an MSc in Digital Media Technology from Nanyang Technological University, Singapore, and a BSc in Computer Science and Technology from Northwest University, China.
about.currentFocus: Building AI-driven research toolchains for smart electrochemical laboratories.
